articles.title: FIFA World Cup warm-ups: Modric, Pasalic score as Croatia edges Slovenia
articles.description: Pasalic’s injury-time winner helped Croatia overcome Slovenia 2-1 after Andraz Sporar cancelled out Luka Modric’s second-half opener.

articles.title: Knox Jolie-Pitt channels dad Brad Pitt's 'Fight Club' energy in Muay Thai match - WATCH
articles.description: Angelina Jolie's son, Knox, recently showcased impressive Muay Thai skills in a viral video, drawing comparisons to his father, Brad Pitt's 'Fight Club' persona. Attended by his mother and twin sister, the teen fighter entered the ring on his graduation day, even inviting classmates to witness his bout. Knox, largely private, has been dedicated to martial arts training.

articles.title: Florentino Pérez confirms José Mourinho’s Real Madrid return and teases record-breaking mystery signing after re-election until 2030
articles.description: Florentino Pérez has been re-elected as Real Madrid president until 2030 after defeating challenger Enrique Riquelme in a rare contested vote. The result extends his long and influential reign at the Santiago Bernabéu, with promises of major sporting changes including managerial decisions, potential transfers and squad renewal. Attention now turns to how he will reshape the club’s next era.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup warm-ups: Colombia cruises past Jordan as Jhon Arias nets twice
articles.description: A brace from Jhon Arias helped Colombia beat Jordan 2-0 in an international friendly, extending its winning run ahead of the World Cup.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: England full squad list, predicted starting XI, injury status and more
articles.description: England head into the 2026 FIFA World Cup carrying huge expectations after decades of near misses on the international stage. Under Thomas Tuchel, the Three Lions boast a balanced squad featuring stars such as Harry Kane, Jude Bellingham, Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka. With no major injury concerns and a favorable group-stage draw against Croatia, Ghana and Panama, England have the talent and depth to challenge for the title. The question now is whether this generation can finally convert potential into silverware and end the nation's long World Cup drought.

articles.title: '501 Runs, SR Almost 200': Ajit Agarkar Questioned For Ignoring 'Best Middle-Order Batter In India'
articles.description: Despite impressing in IPL, the selection committee hasn't picked him in the India squad.

articles.title: Alexander Zverev's French Open triumph sparks new 'Big 3' hopes: 'From now on, it's going to be completely different'
articles.description: Alexander Zverev's first Grand Slam win could help him gain confidence to win a few more, believe experts as the German looks to break the Jannik Sinner-Carlos Alcaraz duopoly in men's tennis.

articles.title: At last, glory achieved: Zverev secures first Grand Slam title at French Open; German fights off Cobolli in a five-set thriller
articles.description: Alexander Zverev finally clinched his maiden Grand Slam title at the French Open, overcoming a tenacious Flavio Cobolli in a thrilling five-set final. After a grueling four-hour battle, the second seed collapsed in tears of joy, marking a triumphant end to his journey on the Parisian clay. Zverev's victory, his first major championship, was hard-fought, showcasing resilience and determination.

articles.title: IND vs AFG live score Day 3, One-off Test: Afghanistan 113/5 at Stumps, trails India by 451 runs
articles.description: IND vs AFG: Get all the live score updates, commentary and highlights from Day 3 of the one-off Test between India and Afghanistan in New Chandigarh.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup warm-ups: Martin Odegaard scores late as Norway draws 1-1 with Morocco
articles.description: Norway earned a 1-1 draw with Morocco in an international friendly as Martin Odegaard cancelled out Brahim Diaz’s first-half strike ahead of the FIFA World Cup.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumor: Cincinnati Bengals and Green Bay Packers emerge as top landing spots for $75M New Orleans Saints star
articles.description: The New Orleans Saints’ star player Alvin Kamara has dominated headlines as he is speculated to be traded ahead of the new season sparking chaos among fans. While a number of teams have been linked to him in the last few weeks, the Cincinnati Bengals and the Green Bay Packers have emerged as potential landing destinations for the star player.

articles.title: French Open 2026 Final: Why Alexander Zverev’s Maiden Grand Slam Title Is Historic? Explained
articles.description: Alexander Zverev won his first Grand Slam at the 2026 French Open, beating Flavio Cobolli in a thrilling five-set final. The victory ended a 30-year German drought and completed his rare Quadruple Crown.

articles.title: Cobolli sees bright future despite French Open final heartbreak
articles.description: PARIS, June 7 : Flavio Cobolli left everything on Court Philippe Chatrier as he chased a first Grand Slam title on Sunday, but the Italian admitted the pressure of playing on the biggest stage ultimately proved decisive in a heartbreaking defeat.The 24-year-old arrived at Roland Garros having never gone beyon

articles.description: The build-up to the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup changed gears with a spectacular Captains' Carnival in London ahead of the tournament opener on June 12.

articles.title: Alexander Zverev won the French Open title but Sophia Thomalla’s earlier remark still stole the spotlight
articles.description: Alexander Zverev reached the 2026 French Open final with a chance to win his first Grand Slam title. However, his girlfriend Sophia Thomalla was not expected to attend the match in Paris because of work commitments. Reports said she planned to watch from Cologne and fly to Paris only if Zverev won. The German also joked about his father after reaching the final.

articles.title: Hamilton ready to level-up and keep chasing Antonelli

articles.title: Who was Stacey King? Three-time NBA champion and Bulls legend dead at 59 - Check cause of death
articles.description: Chicago Bulls legend Stacey King, a three-time NBA champion and beloved broadcaster, has passed away at 59. Known for his vibrant personality and deep connection with fans, King's impact on the Bulls spanned over three decades, from his dominant college career at Oklahoma to his iconic role in bringing Bulls basketball into homes.

articles.title: Gavaskar, Swann laud Manav Suthar; call him 'strong Test contender'
articles.description: Former cricketers Sunil Gavaskar and Graeme Swann praised young all-rounder Manav Suthar for his impressive Test debut against Afghanistan. Gavaskar called him a 'strong contender at Test level' while Swann lauded his control and adaptability.

articles.title: Manav Suthar gives a trailer of his talent
articles.description: Cricket debut: Manav Suthar shone for India in the one-off Test versus Afghanistan, scoring 28 runs and taking 3/21. With 129 first-class wickets and strong red-ball skills, the young left-arm spinner impressed selectors and teammates alike.

articles.title: Pepe Marti shares behind-the-scenes moments from his maiden Monaco podium: “This is the first of many, many trophies”
articles.description: Cupra Kiro driver Pepe Marti has shared a nine-minute YouTube vlog giving fans a behind-the-scenes look at his first Formula E podium. It shows all that went about in the paddock before and after the Round 9 race in Monaco. Interestingly, the video does not feature teammate Dan Ticktum, who lost his podium finish to Marti after receiving a post-race penalty.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C Preview: Brazil Lead the Way, But Morocco Lurk
articles.description: Brazil begin their World Cup title hunt in Group C, but Morocco's giant-killing pedigree, Scotland's hopes and Haiti's return promise plenty of drama.

articles.description: Canada’s home World Cup campaign begins against Bosnia and Herzegovina, but Switzerland, Qatar and injury concerns around Alphonso Davies make Group B unpredictable.

articles.description: Mexico open the World Cup on home soil, but South Korea, Czechia and returning South Africa all have ambitions of their own in one of the tournament’s most intriguing groups.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup: Listing all the major firsts for the 2026 edition of the mega event
articles.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off soon and with 48 teams participating in the event, a lot of history is set to be created at the mega event. Check out all the major firsts that will take place at the football World Cup.

articles.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3: All Sprites, abilities, and extraction guide
articles.description: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3's Runners update introduces Sprites, offering unique passive buffs to aid players in matches. These Sprites can be found in chests, dropped by opponents, or discovered on the Shattered Coast map. Players can also extract Sprites to add them to their permanent collection, earning Sprite Dust in the process.

articles.title: PM Hails Indian Women's Football Team On SAFF Championship 2026 Win: 'Will Encourage More Youngsters'
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi hailed India's SAFF Women's Championship victory, saying the team's success will inspire more youngsters to take up football in the future.

articles.title: Gabby Thomas wins 200m title at Lone Star Grand Prix, sets 2026 world best
articles.description: With her effort in College Station, Texas, Thomas broke the former 2026 world best of 21.86 by reigning Olympic 100m champion Julien Alfred of St. Lucia, set on April 30 in Austin, Texas.

articles.title: Shubman Gill's T20I Snub: Not Strike Rate, Report Reveals Actual Reason Behind BCCI's Move
articles.description: While Shubman Gill is not in the T20I scheme of things as of now, he is expected to bounce back into contention before the start of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics or the T20 World Cup in Australia.

articles.title: Ashwin on Suryakumar's T20I snub: A significant precedent set
articles.description: R Ashwin voiced concern over Suryakumar Yadav's T20I omission, calling it a 'landmark' precedent. He questioned dropping a T20 World Cup-winning captain and the appointment of Shreyas Iyer from outside the squad.

articles.title: WI vs SL 2nd ODI abandoned due to rain; hosts' series hopes dashed
articles.description: Persistent rain at Sabina Park forced the abandonment of the second ODI between West Indies and Sri Lanka. West Indies won the toss but no ball was bowled. The washout ends the hosts' series victory hopes, with Sri Lanka maintaining their 1-0 lead.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Iran slams US over ‘discriminatory’ denial of visas to 15 football officials
articles.description: Iran has also demanded FIFA to hold the US accountable for the discriminatory treatment of Iranian administrative officials, and violation of its terms.

articles.title: Germany Beat Combative US In Co-Hosts' Final FIFA World Cup Warmup
articles.description: Kai Havertz and Leroy Sane led Germany to a 2-1 win over the United States in Chicago on Saturday, but an impressive performance in defeat by the World Cup co-hosts will do little to dampen feverish expectations among home fans.

articles.title: Portugal-Chile Friendly Turns Violent; Trouble Brews For Cristiano Ronaldo's FIFA World Cup Plans: Watch
articles.description: Portugal's World Cup preparations suffered a setback after Rafael Leao was sent off during a fiery friendly against Chile. The Portugal star now faces uncertainty as FIFA may consider possible disciplinary action.

articles.title: Shreyas' First Reaction After Replacing Suryakumar As India's T20I Captain
articles.description: Shreyas Iyer "honoured" as he replaced Suryakumar Yadav as India's new T20I captain.

articles.title: Ajit Agarkar worried about ‘burnout’, Shubman Gill nudged to ‘remain fit’ for 2027 ODI World Cup and WTC: Report
articles.description: According to a report, Shubman Gill has been categorically told to stay fit for the WTC and the ODI World Cup.

articles.title: AR Rahman to perform at the Attari-Wagah border in Punjab today
articles.description: Organised by the team of Imtiaz Ali’s Main Waapas Aaunga, the musical salute to the BSF is scheduled to take place during the Beating Retreat parade at the border.
